battleTraits.name: The Infectious Hosts
battleTraits.effect: One of your Pusgoyle Blightlords and one of your Plaguebearers units are not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, from the third battle round onwards, they can use the ‘Daemonic Summoning’ ability.

battleTraits.name: Daemonic Summoning
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Diseased
battleTraits.effect: Each time an attack made by a friendly model scores a critical hit, you receive 1 disease point, to a maximum of 7.

battleTraits.name: Nurgle's Embrace
battleTraits.effect: Spend any number of your disease points. For each disease point you spend, pick an enemy unit that is in combat with any of your units and roll a dice. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit (you can pick the same enemy unit more than once).

enhancements.name: Summoner of Plaguebearers
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly Plaguebearers unit wholly within 14" of your general.
enhancements.effect: Return 1 slain model to that unit.

enhancements.name: Gardener of Nurgle
enhancements.declare: If your general is contesting an objective not contested by any enemy models, roll a dice.
enhancements.effect: On a 3+, that objective is considered by you to be desecrated. Friendly units have Ward (4+) while they are contesting a desecrated objective. If your opponent gains control of a desecrated objective, it is no longer desecrated.

enhancements.name: Pestilent Breath
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 7" of your general and roll a dice for each model in that unit.
enhancements.effect: For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit.

enhancements.name: Gift of Febrile Frenzy
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 7" of your general.

regimentAbilities.name: Locus of Fecundity
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Phase, Your Hero Phase

regimentAbilities.name: Infested with Wonders
regimentAbilities.effect: Each time a friendly model is slain, before it is removed from play, you can pick an enemy unit within 1" of it and roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit.

abilities.name: Keep Counting, I'm Watching You
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly Plaguebearers unit wholly within 14" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Pick 1 of the following. The effect lasts until the start of your next turn. Tally of Blows: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target unit’s melee weapons. Recorded Stamina: Add 1 to save rolls for the target unit.

abilities.name: Wrack and Ruin
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target and roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Relentless Attackers
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy Infantry unit in combat with this unit to be the target and roll a dice for each model in this unit that is within the target unit’s combat range.
abilities.effect: For each roll that exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, inflict 1 mortal damage on it.

abilities.name: Cloud of Flies
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target this unit.
